prerequisites.value: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Greater Disarm, Improved Disarm, base attack bonus +11.

description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you successfully use a combat maneuver to disarm an opponent, the disarmed weapon lands up to 15 feet away from its wielder, in the direction you choose. Alternatively, you can make a ranged attack as an immediate action with the disarmed weapon against another opponent, as long as the disarmed weapon is a light or one-handed weapon. If the weapon is not a thrown weapon, you take a â4 penalty on the attack roll. You take a â4 penalty on your attack roll if you do not have a free hand.
